examples: Audi wants to add another subcompact model to its range.
This slickly styled subcompact has been a top seller in Europe since late 2008.
Sales of micro and subcompact cars of all engine sizes rose only modestly in the first 11 months of 2007.
Subcompact crossovers in particular are emerging as a trend with the potential to spread worldwide.
U.S. sales of subcompact cars surged by around 50 percent last year, thanks in part to higher gas prices.
